textByHashes.1423640993687a4fa3969766d4210e39188f2125: Yes I was near the south east corner when I saw Elena walking by. I was about to run to greet her when some men jumped out. They shoved a sack over her head and dragged her into a building.
textByHashes.c814d1edd41148d63ebe2a03ed2f9da6868cd295: It was the boarded up building with no windows in the south east corner of West Ardougne.
textByHashes.fee69cb1aab0ddfab936e5ca2334de8661fde998: I hope you find her. She was nice.
textByHashes.55ef5e49ad0a3eea9f5e6e29fce8e1f5699e9bea: Elena's come to visit! Elena's come to visit!
textByHashes.30e37c65314baaa6ce68e9fe93e39f6a33fea527: She said she had some top secret work to do. Mummy and daddy will know.
textByHashes.42f630271f9ed644f2ae02e7e6438edc8ae761d4: I hope she comes and visits sometime.
textByHashes.f390c7fecc04860a35ef1a0e3cbddc87e1a65465: I hope Elena comes to visit soon.
